title: Apted Squelsh
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Apted Squelsh |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=She/her{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Take a seat, please. You performed admirably during yesterday's exercise. Your unit had a fifty percent reduction in both genuine and sim casualties, with no loss of speed or efficiency. That's what we like to hear.|Squelsh, to CT-96/298|}} '''Apted Squelsh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], she oversaw [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] at a training camp on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Vandor-3]], under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Arikakon Baraka]]. During that [[Time/Legends|time]], she briefed [[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jangotat|CT-96/298]] on his [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|I have a new assignment for you. I assume you are prepared?''"
"''One hundred percent, ma'am.''"
"''You will accompany and assist two Jedi to a planet called Ord Cestus. Do you know it?''"
"''No, ma'am. But I'll get up to speed immediately. My support?''"
"''Four men.|Squelsh and CT-96/298|}} Apted Squelsh was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Squelsh served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] and held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Major/Legends|major]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Squelsh oversaw the actions of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] at the training camp on [[Vandor-3]], a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During her [[Time/Legends|time]] at Vandor-3, Squelsh ordered [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jangotat|CT-96/298]], nicknamed "Nate," to visit her at her office for an administrative review. When Nate arrived, Squelsh congratulated him on the success of his unit during their recent training exercise and informed him that he had a new assignment—to assist two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on a [[Mission to Ord Cestus|mission]] to the planet [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. After the briefing, Nate asked Squelsh if [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Arikakon Baraka]], the overseer of the training camp, had mentioned anything about the achievement of his unit during their recent training exercise. Squelsh replied that Baraka was satisfied with the performance of his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] before she dismissed the ARC [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Thank you, ma'am.''"
"''That is all.|CT-96/298 and Squelsh|}} Apted Squelsh was a Mon Calamari with large, dark [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. She told Nate of her satisfaction with him when his unit cut their simulated and real [[Death/Legends|death]]-rate by 50 percent while retaining their efficacy in the training exercise. Upon the [[Cloning/Legends|clone's]] request, she also informed him about Admiral Baraka's comment regarding the achievement of his unit. ==Behind the scenes== Squelsh appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[The Cestus Deception]]'', written by [[Steven Barnes]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}} *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Apted Squelsh }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Squelsh, Apted}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Grand Army of the Republic officers]] [[Category:Mon Calamari]]
